subject: Bluetooth mouse keeps disconnecting
description: Wireless mouse drops connection several times per day; works again after toggle or reboot.

ts_steps.title: Power and distance
ts_steps.action: Replace or recharge batteries; move receiver/USB closer; remove metal objects between mouse and Mac.

ts_steps.title: Re-pair the device
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Bluetooth — remove device, put mouse in pairing mode, pair again.

ts_steps.title: Reset Bluetooth module (user-safe)
ts_steps.action: Toggle Bluetooth off/on; if still failing, restart Mac and test on a clean user session if available.

internal_information: Hardware battery/low signal vs Bluetooth plist issues. Third-party USB hubs can interfere. Swap mouse if under warranty if pattern persists on multiple Macs.
